# Copilot Project Checklist

- [x] Verify `.github/copilot-instructions.md` exists
- [x] Clarify project requirements (React client + Express backend)
- [x] Scaffold the project (npm workspaces: `client/`, `server/`)
- [x] Customize the project (gallery/cart/checkout/auth/admin/downloads)
- [x] Install required extensions (none required)
- [x] Compile the project (`npm -w server run build`, `npm -w client run build`)
- [x] Ensure documentation is complete (`README.md`, `.env.example` files)
- [ ] Create and run VS Code task (optional)
- [ ] Launch in debugger (ask user first)
